untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (5-minute and 60-minute contexts simultaneously) and detection of narrow range breakouts. The allowed indicator set does not support: (1) explicit timeframe switching for sma_20 on 5-min vs 60-min charts, (2) narrow range detection (requires historical price volatility analysis), (3) 'price action well above MA' as a quantifiable threshold, and (4) 'slow and steady move with multiple entry opportunities' as a measurable condition. Monthly pivot resistance (r1) is available but the multi-timeframe confirmation logic cannot be properly encoded.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture: close > sma_20 (price above 20MA), sma_20 crosses above sma_50 (overlap at support interpreted as crossover), and close > r1 (breakout above monthly pivot resistance). However, this loses the critical multi-timeframe context and narrow range detection that are core to this signal. A proper backtest would require custom indicators for timeframe-specific MAs and range detection.
